title: thymus patavinus var. graveolens
intro: Thymus patavinus var. graveolens, also known as Thymus serpyllum var. graveolens, is a lesser-known variety of creeping thyme, a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to the mountains of Northern Italy. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thymus patavinus var. graveolens include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, soothe coughs, and support respiratory health.
